description: Shared ESLint base configuration for Gravity UI projects with TypeScript rules. Does NOT include React, a11y, Prettier, or import-order rules — those are separate optional sub-configs.
Optional Prettier-compatible ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config when using Prettier to disable rules that conflict with Prettier formatting.
Optional accessibility (a11y) ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config to enable rules that catch accessibility issues.
Optional import-order ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config to enforce a convention on module import ordering.

Low-level base ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Contains core JS rules (best-practices, variables, stylistic) using Babel parser, without TypeScript or React rules. The default export of the package already composes this with the TypeScript sub-config.
Optional TypeScript ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Adds @typescript-eslint rules, stylistic member formatting, and TypeScript-aware import resolution. Applied only to .ts/.tsx files.

Optional React ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Adds eslint-plugin-react and eslint-plugin-react-hooks rules with JSX support. Use eslint-config/client instead if you also need browser globals.
Optional client-side ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Composes the React sub-config and adds browser globals. Use this for front-end/browser applications.
Optional server-side ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Sets Node.js globals and adds eslint-plugin-security rules to catch common server-side security issues.
